title: Bun Debug Adapter Launch Configuration
description: Configuration schema for debugging Bun applications with the bun-debugger extension.

type.description: Must be 'bun-debug' to use this adapter.

program.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path to the Bun script to debug.

args.description: Command-line arguments passed to the Bun script.

cwd.description: Working directory for the debuggee. Defaults to the workspace root.

stopOnEntry.description: Pause execution at the first line.
